page.name: CUE SEARCH

pad1.query: has_cue 'MIX IN 1' ? on : has_cue 'INTRO 1' ? on : has_cue 'MIX IN' ? on : has_cue 'INTRO'
pad1.color: has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? cue_color "MIX IN 1" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? cue_color "INTRO 1" : has_cue "MIX IN" ? cue_color "MIX IN" : has_cue "INTRO" ? cue_color "INTRO" : offcolor
pad1.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? get_text "MIX IN 1" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? get_text "INTRO 1" : has_cue "MIX IN" ? get_text "MIX IN" : has_cue "INTRO" ? get_text "INTRO" : ""`

page.pad1: has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 1" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? goto_cue "INTRO 1" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "MIX IN" ? goto_cue "MIX IN" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "INTRO" ? goto_cue "INTRO" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad2: has_cue "BUILD 1" ? goto_cue "BUILD 1" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "BUILD" ? goto_cue "BUILD" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad3: has_cue "CUT 1" ? goto_cue "CUT 1" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "CUT" ? goto_cue "CUT" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad4: has_cue "DROP 1" ? goto_cue "DROP 1" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "DROP" ? goto_cue "DROP" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing

pad5.color: has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? cue_color "MIX IN 2" : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? cue_color "INTRO 2" : offcolor
pad5.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? get_text "MIX IN 2" : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? get_text "INTRO 2" : ""`

page.pad5: has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 2" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? goto_cue "INTRO 2" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad6: has_cue "BUILD 2" ? goto_cue "BUILD 2" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad7: has_cue "CUT 2" ? goto_cue "CUT 2" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad8: has_cue "DROP 2" ? goto_cue "DROP 2" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing

pad9.color: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? cue_color "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? cue_color "INTRO 3" : offcolor
pad9.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? get_text "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? get_text "INTRO 3" : ""`

page.pad9: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 3" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? goto_cue "INTRO 3" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing

page.pad11: has_cue "CUT 3" ? goto_cue "CUT 3" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad12: has_cue "DROP 3" ? goto_cue "DROP 3" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing

pad13.color: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? cue_color "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? cue_color "INTRO 4" : offcolor
pad13.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? get_text "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? get_text "INTRO 4" : ""`

page.pad13: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 4" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? goto_cue "INTRO 4" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad14: has_cue "BUILD 4" ? goto_cue "BUILD 4" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad15: has_cue "CUT 4" ? goto_cue "CUT 4" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing
page.pad16: has_cue "DROP 4" ? goto_cue "DROP 4" & play & phrase_sync 4 & bpm_sync : nothing

shift_pad1.color: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? cue_color "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? cue_color "INTRO 3" : offcolor
shift_pad1.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? get_text "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? get_text "INTRO 3" : ""`

page.shift_pad1: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 3" & play : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? goto_cue "INTRO 3" & play : nothing

shift_pad5.color: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? cue_color "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? cue_color "INTRO 4" : offcolor
shift_pad5.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? get_text "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? get_text "INTRO 4" : ""`

page.shift_pad5: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 4" & play : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? goto_cue "INTRO 4" & play : nothing

shift_pad13.name: `param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 1`" ? cue_name 1 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 2`" ? cue_name 2 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 3`" ? cue_name 3 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? cue_name 4 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? cue_name 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? cue_name 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? cue_name 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? cue_name 8 : get_text ""`

page.shift_pad13: param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 1`" ? goto_cue 1 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 2`" ? goto_cue 2 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 3`" ? goto_cue 3 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? goto_cue 4 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? goto_cue 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing

page.shift_pad14: param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 1`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 2`" ? goto_cue 2 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 3`" ? goto_cue 3 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? goto_cue 4 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? goto_cue 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 2`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 3`" ? goto_cue 3 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? goto_cue 4 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? goto_cue 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 3`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? goto_cue 4 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? goto_cue 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 4`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? goto_cue 5 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 5`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? goto_cue 6 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 6`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? goto_cue 7 : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 7`" ? param_contains "INTRO" "`cue_name 8`" ? goto_cue 8 : nothing : nothing
